message:
🐛 Add refresh icons to GPU reservation dashboard cards and cache CronJob status (#1175)

GPU cards in the reservation dashboard tab had no refresh icon because
onRefresh was not passed to CardWrapper. Wire up useRefreshIndicator
with GPU node + cluster refetch so all dashboard tab cards get the
refresh button matching their behavior on the main dashboard.

Convert useGPUHealthCronJob from raw useState to useCache for proper
persistent caching — status now persists across navigation and shares
the standard polling/refresh infrastructure.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
